channel.title: ToolPilot Blog
channel.description: Tips, guides and tutorials about online developer tools, password security, encoding, and more.

item.title: Best JSON Formatters in 2026
item.description: Compare the top JSON formatting tools available online. Learn what makes a great JSON formatter and how to choose the right one for your workflow.

item.title: How to Create Strong Passwords in 2026
item.description: Master password security with actionable tips and best practices. Discover the essential strategies for creating and managing strong passwords in 2026.

item.title: Developer Tools Every Web Dev Needs in 2026
item.description: Explore the essential developer tools that every web developer should have in their toolkit. From JSON formatting to regex testing, we cover it all.

item.title: Understanding Base64 Encoding: A Complete Guide
item.description: Learn what Base64 encoding is, how it works, and why it matters. This beginner-friendly guide explains the fundamentals of data encoding.

item.title: Unix Timestamps Explained: Complete Developer Guide
item.description: Understand Unix timestamps and epoch time. Learn how to convert between human-readable dates and Unix timestamps in seconds.

item.title: Best Free Developer Tools in 2026
item.description: The ultimate collection of free developer tools for 2026. Discover tools that streamline your development workflow.

item.title: Best Password Managers 2026
item.description: Review the top password managers for 2026. Compare security features, pricing, and usability.

item.title: Best QR Code Generators Online
item.description: Compare top QR code generators and learn which tools offer the best features.

item.title: Best Regex Testers Online
item.description: Evaluate the best regex testers available online with live matching and syntax highlighting.

item.title: Color Theory: Hex, RGB, and HSL
item.description: Master color formats and theory. Understand Hex, RGB, and HSL color models for web design.

item.title: Cron Expressions: Complete Guide
item.description: Master cron expressions for task scheduling. Learn syntax and common patterns for automation.

item.title: CSS Gradients: Complete Guide
item.description: Create stunning CSS gradients with examples. Learn linear, radial, and conic gradients.

item.title: CSS Minification Guide
item.description: Optimize CSS with minification. Learn best practices and tools to reduce file sizes.

item.title: How to Generate QR Codes
item.description: Generate QR codes for any purpose. Learn how to create QR codes for URLs, contact info, and more.

item.title: HTML to Markdown Conversion
item.description: Convert HTML to Markdown format. Learn techniques and tools for transformation.

item.title: JavaScript Minification Guide
item.description: Minify JavaScript for better performance. Learn techniques and tools to reduce file sizes.

item.title: JSON to CSV Conversion Guide
item.description: Convert JSON data to CSV format. Learn how to transform structured JSON into spreadsheet-friendly files.

item.title: JWT Tokens Explained
item.description: Understand JWT tokens and their structure. Learn how to decode and use JWTs in authentication.

item.title: Linux File Permissions Explained
item.description: Master Linux file permissions and chmod. Learn to calculate and secure files properly.

item.title: Meta Tags and SEO Guide
item.description: Optimize your site with meta tags. Learn which tags matter for SEO and best practices.

item.title: SVG to Image Conversion
item.description: Convert SVG to PNG and other formats. Learn how to export vector graphics to raster formats.

item.title: UUID Generation Guide
item.description: Generate unique identifiers with UUIDs. Learn about UUID versions and bulk generation.

item.title: YAML vs JSON
item.description: Compare YAML and JSON formats. Understand differences and when to use each format.
